overview:
‘Let Snow Man Do It’ (Sore Snow Man ni Yarasete Kudasai) is a variety programme produced by TBS Television. Its abbreviated title is ‘Sore Suno’.

As Snow Man’s first programme in which they served as hosts, it was initially broadcast as a special programme during TBS’s late-night slot. It subsequently became a regular programme, with all 47 episodes streamed on the video-on-demand service Paravi every Friday night from 24 April 2020 to 2 April 2021. From 11 April 2021, the programme moved to TBS and has been broadcast regularly every Sunday from 13:00 to 13:30 (JST).
name: Sore Snow Man ni Yarasete kudasai

overview:
Hello there! It's me, Harry Hill!

I've got a new show, and this time, it's visualised, A VODSCARF.

Join me, my son Gary and Sarah the A.I Bot as we talk to a motley crew of comedians, celebrities and cultural icons, and if that wasn't enough we all learn together as we speak to an expert on stuff like the big bang, day of the dead, and even FLIES as part of our theme of the week! PLUS introducing the game everyone is talking about, Name The Seed

overview:
You're My Favorite Song is a heartwarming romance drama that follows Angel, a brilliant young girl determined to fulfill her dying grandfather's lifelong dream of building a beach resort.

But when a powerful business empire sets its sights on their prized beachfront property, Angel finds herself in an uphill battle to protect her family's future. With the help of her classmates, she embarks on a journey filled with friendship, first love, and the courage to stand up for what matters most.

Together, these young dreamers must fight to save the resort, honor a cherished legacy, and prove that even the biggest dreams can come true.

original_name: เพลงรักพยัคฆ์ร้าย
overview: Singer Puna dreams of stardom and uncovering the truth behind her parents' deaths, forming an alliance with a police officer as the hunt turns personal.
name: The Rhythm of Revenge

overview: It's one of the world's toughest and most dangerous jobs. And as a nationwide driver shortage threatens to stall Australia's economy, a new generation of Rookie Truckers is stepping in to take the wheel. Guiding them through this baptism-by-fire are Yogi, Steve, and Sludge—three long-haul veterans determined to pass on the torch before they hang up their keys.Facing blowouts, breakdowns, and extreme weather on the open road, the Rookie Truckers are pushed to the limit to earn their stripes—and a full-time job. They meet all kinds of colourful characters as they crisscross the continent. And along the way, fine-tune their survival skills, master the art of bush mechanics, and grow into the truckers who will keep Australia moving. Gritty and gripping, it's a high-stakes all-terrain journey packed with rugged landscapes, real drama, and storylines of mentorship and transformation.
name: Rookie Truckers

overview: Beter as Gister is a South African, Afrikaans-language television drama series which revolves around four families and especially the role of the men in them, inspired by the question: Why are fathers held to a different standard than mothers?
name: Beter as Gister

overview: Single mother Dr. Noyonika lives a serene life with her daughter, Ujjayani. Then enters pop star Ishaan, reigniting her world, albeit with uncalled chaos!
name: Sairaab

overview: Bas Tera Saath Ho is a story of resilience born from loss, where a young boy’s world shatters far too soon. After losing his parents in a tragic accident, Anas finds himself in a home that offers shelter, but not warmth.
name: Bas Tera Saath Ho

overview: A family drama inspired by real stories from Kuwaiti society. the series explores love, separation, and unspoken emotional struggles within one family. Through quiet moments and layered relationships, Little Steps reflects the realities of Gulf families with honesty, warmth, and emotional depth.
name: Little Steps

overview: For its 25th anniversary, DÉCORE TA VIE returns, with Saskia, to surprise deserving people, transform rooms in a day and always inspire!
name: Décore ta vie, 25 ans

overview: Dermot O'Leary goes back to his roots in this foodie adventure. Follow him as he explores all the gastronomic delights that the Emerald Isle has to offer.
name: Dermot O'Leary's Taste of Ireland

overview: After a mysterious accident, a man returns home to find a stranger living his life—and everyone, even his wife, has forgotten who he is.
name: My Fiction

overview: Contestants live inside a house that is streamed 24/7 for six weeks. Viewers can prank contestants and determine what happens to them via donations. A grand prize is awarded to the last surviving contestant.
name: Fishtank

overview: Inspired by the famous Gujarati column Duniya Ne Undha Chasma by Taarak Mehta, this show captures the everyday life in Gokuldham Co-operative Society, addressing socially relevant issues with humor. At its heart is Jethalal, an uneducated Gujarati businessman, who often seeks guidance from his wise neighbor and friend, Taarak Mehta. Jethalal lives with his naive yet lovable wife Daya Ben and their mischievous son Tapu, whose antics frequently disrupt the peace of the society. The members often warn Jethalal to control Tapu or face eviction. In desperation, he calls his father, Champaklal, from the village, hoping he’ll instill discipline in Tapu. Instead, the grandfather-grandson duo teams up, creating even more chaos and turning Jethalal’s life into a comedic roller coaster. The show blends family dynamics, friendship, and neighborhood bonds with a dose of satire and laughter.
name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

overview: After years of silence, Lil Kleine is working on his comeback with a new album. Although he doubts his music's relevance to an existing scene, he unexpectedly finds new love. But old habits put a strain on the relationship. The breakup brings both pain and inspiration: can he restore his life and love, or will he fall back into old patterns?
name: Lil Kleine

overview: Two bitter basketball rivals. One wealthy sugar daddy. A dangerous game of love, dominance, and survival.  When financial desperation forces fierce community basketball rivals Kyle (Jake Ulan) and Jerry (Angelo Chris De Lara) to share the same manipulative benefactor, their intense hostility takes a shocking turn. Forced to live under the same roof, the line between rivalry and romance blurs as they secretly fall for each other. But when their powerful sugar daddy, Robert, discovers their secret, the boys must risk everything—including their basketball dreams—to fight for their freedom and their relationship.  Will they take the hit, or will they win it all?
name: Sugar Games

overview:
We TV and All Reality have revealed the trailer and key art for This Is Poly, a new, unscripted series exploring the real lives of modern polyamorous relationships. The 8-episode series takes a first-of-its-kind look at the world of polyamory, following the lives of five wildly different polycules, interconnected groups of people in polyamorous relationships.

As they build lives and families outside traditional norms, the series dives into the emotional realities of jealousy, commitment, communication, and trust, testing every rule of love and redefining what it means to be a family. This Is Poly premieres Friday, May 29, at 9:30 pm Et/Pt, immediately following the season premiere of Love After Lockup at 8 pm Et/Pt.
name: This is Poly

overview: Daniel Faitaua takes the tried-and-true Tipping Point formula and infuses it with a distinctly Kiwi flavour, alongside some some of Aotearoa's favourite famous faces
name: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ

overview: The housing market is still a disaster. To do something about it, RTL is now launching *Huizenruilers* (House Swappers). This program follows people who are stuck in their current situation. Think of families outgrowing their homes or people who simply want to downsize. Instead of endlessly searching for a new and, above all, suitable place to live, they decide to swap with another household. But there is a small catch!
name: Huizenruilers
